methodology: Editorial availability model. Local and regular imports count as easy; specialty retail and rare imports are separate tiers. Trade records do not by themselves prove normal retail availability.

note.de: Import ist statistisch nachweisbar, im Verhältnis zur Bevölkerung aber gering; meist Premium- oder Spezialhandel.
note.en: Imports are statistically recorded but small relative to the population; mostly premium or specialty retail.

note.de: Kein belastbarer Nachweis für normale lokale Erzeugung oder reguläre Marktverfügbarkeit.
note.en: No reliable evidence of normal local production or regular retail availability.

tradeData.method: Per-capita import and export thresholds; HS basket matches are estimates; legal review is separate.
